arts.ttl: ‘I’m going to go’: David Seaman has now predicted the result of Man City vs Arsenal on Sunday
arts.sum: Arsenal face Manchester City on Sunday in what could be a truly decisive game in the Premier League title race. Arsenal and Manchester City have...

arts.ttl: The most valuable game in history? Man City and Arsenal could break record
arts.sum: The two best teams in England meet on Sunday afternoon and it already feels like a significant fixture in the Premier League title race. Manchester City were crowned champions for an...

arts.ttl: Man City unveil new mosaic in memory of Sir Howard Bernstein at the Etihad Stadium
arts.sum: Manchester City have unveiled a new mosaic in memory of Sir Howard Bernstein.

arts.ttl: Manchester City unveils mosaic tribute to Sir Howard Bernstein at the Etihad Stadium
arts.sum: Created by renowned Manchester artist Mark Kennedy, the mosaic was unveiled by Chairman, Khaldoon Al Mubarak earlier today, with Sir Howard’s close family in attendance. Manchester City Football Club has today unveiled a mosaic dedicated to the memory of the Club’s former Honorary President, Sir Howard Bernstein at the Etihad Stadium.

arts.ttl: Ethan Wheatley scores as Manchester United Under-21s suffer derby day defeat to Man City
arts.sum: Man United's Under-21s were beaten by rivals Manchester City in Saturday's mini Manchester derby at the club's Carrington training base.

arts.ttl: Team News: Manchester City vs. Arsenal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Manchester City and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Nine players could miss Man City vs Arsenal after new Kevin De Bruyne injury update
arts.sum: After missing the North London Derby win over Tottenham, Martin Odegaard was again absent with the ankle injury picked up on international duty. In the clash against Inter, Kevin De Bruyne went off with an injury and while Guardiola did not rule him out of the weekend, his update was not very promising.

arts.ttl: Man City predicted line-up vs Arsenal with Kevin De Bruyne fitness race and Phil Foden decision
arts.sum: Manchester City will be looking to preserve their 100 per cent record in the Premier League this season when they face Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Declan Rice reveals key Mikel Arteta meeting before Man City vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal are plotting how they can break Manchester City's stranglehold on the Premier League title ahead of their crucial visit to the Etihad Stadium on Sunday afternoon

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola could be without three Man City players for Arsenal Premier League clash
arts.sum: Manchester City could be missing three key players for the early-season title clash against Arsenal on Sunday. Oleksandr Zinchenko has also missed the Gunners past two games with a calf injury but it remains to be seen if the Ukrainian is fit enough to return for the clash with City.
